Description:
With a base clock speed of 2.0GHz and max turbo frequency of 4.5GHz the AMD Ryzen 7 7730U leaves little to be desired over the previous generations
1TB NVMe: A solid slate drive that leaves the power at your fingertips with the fastest data transfers currently available
Windows 11 Home in S Mode has similar functionality to Windows 10 but has all the enhanced features you could ask for
16GB RAM memory allows smooth performance for you everyday use, photo and video editing applications
DDR4 RAM: with its higher bandwidth, everything from multitasking to work reports get the performance boost you've been looking for
Featuring a FHD 1920 x 1080 display, the exceptional resolution delivers crisp performance
15.6" IPS display offers the perfect size to keep you going without consuming too much space
The standard sized keyboard lets you work and play all day without compromise
Wi-Fi 6 (802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax) Wi-Fi antenna delivers a strong and reliable Internet connection
41Wh lithium-ion battery with a run time of up to 7 hours
Label: Dell 15, 15.6" IPS FHD Touch, Ryzen 7 7730U, Radeon, 16GB, 1TB
